title: Doflamingo Kills Rosinante
description: Pages 14–18 focus on doflamingo kills rosinante, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as corazon gives Law his life, his name, and a future, while Doflamingo's cruelty defines Law's reason to fight.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Stop it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: whereze whereze

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: So you are that vergo guy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That vergo guy?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Guh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That means,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You're that kid from the White City.

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: law, eh? I've heard about you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: HAA,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: This ain't gonna do! I'm your senior! You address me as...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That both of you disappeared.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Mister Vergo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: AYAH!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Law!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Damn, this thing's full of information... If this actually managed to get in the hands of the marines,

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: It would mean the end of the family! Every single, carefully laid out plan from here on out!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: The second Corazon!*

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It seems we've let quite the rat sneak into our midst!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: You just ran off one day when you were 8,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: And didn't return to us until 14 years later!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Ugh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Anyone who knows it

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Stop! Stop it! You're Killin' Him!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Because you're his little brother, doffy put his faith in you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: 01 01, they haven't been killed, have they...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: What do you mean?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Keep it short and simple. What are you trying to say,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: vergo?

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: corazon is a marine spy, and

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: He's been in the family all this time simply to undermine you and your plans!

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: Where are you now, doffy?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: We were observing the rendezvous point, swallow Island, from AFAR...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Two Marine battleships showed up...

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: At that point even I realized what was going on. The little brother I raised with loving hands...had turned his own against me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: I've realized this much, at least

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: You guys... you're my true family!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: It pains me, but it seems our worst fears were true all along.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: We've just landed on your island, Minion.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: But it seems we're a little late to the party...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Judging from what's going on around here, barrels' underlings are running around looking for the guy who stole their devil fruit from them.

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: Corazon's surely the culprit!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: If he's with you, do not let him escape! He should have the ope ope no mi with him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: Right. Copy-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Whata-!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: So he's run off, eh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: "Well, whatever. As long as he's not left the city...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: He won't be going anywhere!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Oww! O!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: These threads are hard as hell! They're sharp too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: We can't step outside them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: What... is that...

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: Most likely doffy's powers... if there's one thing...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: We can say for sure, it's that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: We no longer...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: have anywhere to run.

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Parasite threads inside the cage, eh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: I see. So this is hell.

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: I should be able to get law out.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: There's no saving me anymore anyway.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: Even after I die...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: Will you still remember me?

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Law, we've gotta move.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: Cause I'm gonna die with a smile on my face!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: Let's go!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: WAAAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: After all, if one day... you're gonna remember me...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: Isn't it better that you remember- her this smile?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: to the friend with whom he will part... he gives a smile.'

summary: Doflamingo Kills Rosinante advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
